productName: Stinger 1g Blunt - MJ Mix Infused - Georgia Peach - 1g
description: A hybrid blunt of Georgia Frost taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a soft, juicy peach flavor, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
